purpose: Prepared state-level acreage CSVs from USDA ERS Major Land Uses data.

source.name: USDA ERS Major Land Uses all-data CSV

geography: 48 contiguous states; excludes Alaska, Hawaii, and District of Columbia.
notes: ERS Major Land Uses is an acreage accounting dataset for broad land-use categories.
The current ERS downloadable all-data CSV is a revised 2024 release.
The CSVs calculate 250,000-acre block counts as acres / 250000.
The outputs do not spatially place land-use categories within states; use a spatial layer such as NLCD if approximate placement is needed.
